title: INDIVIDUELE BEGELEIDING VOOR PLUIMVEEBEDRIJVEN MET EEN AFZET VIA DE KORTE KETEN
description: A guide presenting individual coaching measures to support poultry farms marketing products through short supply chains, focusing on addressing health, technical, and logistical challenges. It highlights coaching outcomes tested in Brittany and Central France and provides recommendations for expanding the method among poultry advisors.
